prompt: A hyper-detailed premium collectible trading card illustration of Kamen Rider Decade in the center foreground, posed in a ruined futuristic city battlefield under a dramatic cosmic night sky. The armored hero wears a glossy magenta, black, and white suit with a segmented helmet and large luminous green compound eyes, facing the viewer in a powerful stance. One arm is thrust forward toward the camera, holding up a character card between black gloved fingers so the card is clearly visible in forced perspective; the other hand gives a confident thumbs-up. The belt device is prominent at the waist. Surrounding the hero are exactly 8 secondary figures and monsters scattered through the rubble and midair battle scene: 1 blue-and-red armored rider crouching in the bottom left foreground, 1 red-and-gold armored rider on the right midground, 2 small rider figures in the distant center background, 2 flying figures in the upper background, and 2 monstrous enemy creatures on the right side, one mid-right and one bottom-right. The environment is dense with collapsed buildings, broken concrete, sparks, smoke, debris, and cinematic action lighting. Render the whole image as a luxurious holographic SSR card with an ornate prismatic foil border, glittering rainbow refractions, metallic gold filigree framing, and layered collectible-card UI. At the top center, large embossed title text reads KAMEN RIDER DECADE, with smaller text above reading "MASKED RIDER". In the top right is a large metallic badge reading SSR with 5 gold stars beneath it. In the top left and bottom right are 2 circular magenta crest icons. In the lower center is a gold cursive signature reading NickZág. Along the bottom frame are 4 labeled UI sections: left panel "CARD TYPE" over "CHARACTER", center nameplate "KAMEN RIDER DECADE" with Japanese subtitle "仮面ライダーディケイド", a barcode panel beneath, and right panel "RARITY" over "SSR". Add tiny footer text under the barcode reading DECADE COMPLETE 21. Style: ultra-detailed tokusatsu hero art, cinematic photoreal armor textures, dramatic depth, explosive action composition, premium gacha card design, holographic foil print effects, sharp focus on the main hero and card, highly polished game-card promotional artwork.
